name: x-mcp
description: X (Twitter) API tools — post tweets, get timeline, delete tweets, generate images

tools.name: post_tweet
tools.description: Post a tweet with optional image/video via X API v2 + tweepy. Supports .jpg/.png/.gif/.mp4.

tools.name: get_my_tweets
tools.description: Get your recent tweets with metrics. Max 100.

tools.name: generate_image
tools.description: Generate an image using Google Gemini API.
